chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 2079 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi For hearing of MA 7783/17 Mr. Abdul Razzak Dasti, advocate for petitioner Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. along with SIP Muhammad Yaseen Brohi PS Matli for SHO Matli. Learned counsel for petitioner states that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives undertaking that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. is present files comments on behalf of official respondents and states that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide the same protection to the petitioners as is available to other citizen of country. Learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied with the undertaking does not press this petition any further which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
